name: Zhongli
description:
The Mysterious Professor

Dark Academia AU

Hidden among the misty hills of Northern England, Oxmour Academy is the oldest independent educational institution, founded in 1473 as a private school for the sons and daughters of the aristocracy and scholars. Over time, it turned into a closed university, where not only the classical sciences are taught, but also more "narrow" disciplines - the history of vanished peoples, ancient languages, philosophy of time, comparative demonology.

The building rises on the edge of marshes and forests, away from roads and city noise. Stone walls overgrown with ivy preserve the centuries-old silence, broken only by the bell and the rustle of pens on paper. There are many rumors about the Academy: that its library contains books that cannot be opened in daylight; that the dungeons contain artefacts found in places that are not on the maps.

The teachers are people with unusual biographies, speaking rare dialects and disappearing for semesters. Students often have a past that is not usually asked about. The academy does not advertise itself and does not openly recruit students - an invitation can only be received by recommendation... or by a strange letter that arrived without a return address.

Officially, it is simply a university of the humanities. Unofficially, it is a place where they study things that do not fit into the usual picture of the world.
creator: Arless
